details: High-asset divorce client from Ryan Magath (forensic accountant, NJ). No money management experience. First lead from referral pipeline.
advisorApproach: Warm intro through Ryan. Focus on wealth protection post-divorce, investment basics, fresh start planning.

activities.action: Lead created via Ryan Magath referral

details: Niche: High-income entrepreneurs, Act 60 tax optimization, global investors. Targets $500K+ income clients. Founded 2009.
advisorApproach: Hi Victor, I specialize in working with the same high-income entrepreneurs you serve. Many of my clients need both your tax optimization and investment strategies to align. Would love to connect.

details: Niche: Construction contractors, freight/trucking, small business owners. 20+ years, Big 4 background.
advisorApproach: Edgar, your construction and trucking clients accumulate significant cash flow but often lack investment strategy. I help business owners turn tax savings into wealth. Would love to explore a referral relationship.

details: Niche: Real estate investors, startups, HNW individuals. FIU grad, 500+ LinkedIn connections, international tax planning.
advisorApproach: Edward, your real estate and startup clients often have blind spots around wealth accumulation. I work specifically with that profile. Let's connect.

details: Niche: International clients, FIRPTA, cross-border wealth. Attorney + CPA dual credentials. 800 Brickell Ave. Serving clients since 1980.
advisorApproach: Alvaro, your international and FIRPTA clients need wealth management as much as tax planning. My practice focuses on exactly that profile. Would appreciate 15 minutes.

details: Niche: IRS problem resolution, financial modeling, veteran-focused. Virtual firm, modern and tech-forward.
advisorApproach: Your IRS resolution clients are rebuilding wealth after a crisis — exactly when they need a financial advisor. Let's talk about a referral partnership.

details: NextEra Energy CEO. Purchased $19.6M Jupiter mansion. Concentrated equity position in NextEra stock, needs diversification strategy.
advisorApproach: Mr. Ketchum, your recent Jupiter purchase signals a significant wealth transition moment. Concentrated executive equity deserves a dedicated strategy. I specialize in exactly this.

details: American Equity Investment Life CEO. $15.1M Miami penthouse. Insurance industry exec with significant liquidity event.
advisorApproach: Anant, your Miami move signals a new chapter. As a fellow financial services professional, I'd value a conversation about wealth strategies beyond your current focus.

details: International executive. $19.8M Miami penthouse purchase. Cross-border wealth management needs.
advisorApproach: Your recent Miami acquisition suggests you're establishing significant US presence. I specialize in wealth management for international executives building their US portfolio.

details: PE founder. $8.3M Sunny Isles condo purchase. Private equity background with liquidity needs.
advisorApproach: Reid, PE founders often have concentrated illiquid positions alongside significant cash events. I work specifically with that profile in South Florida.

details: Real estate sale exit. $8.3M liquidity event. Needs reinvestment strategy.
advisorApproach: Alexandre, a significant real estate exit creates a unique reinvestment window. I help South Florida investors redeploy capital efficiently.

triggerEvent: Miami expansion for Brazilian wealth clients
details: XP Inc. executive expanding Miami operations for Brazilian HNW clients. Cross-border wealth management opportunity.
advisorApproach: Gustavo, your Miami expansion for Brazilian clients opens collaboration opportunities. I work with international HNW clients navigating US wealth management.

details: Sold $19.6M home to NextEra CEO. Significant liquidity event requiring reinvestment strategy.
advisorApproach: Dr. Oskouei, a $19M+ liquidity event demands immediate strategic attention. I specialize in helping high-net-worth individuals reinvest after significant real estate exits.

details: $10.6M commercial real estate sale. Business owner with significant capital gains and reinvestment needs.
advisorApproach: James, a $10M+ commercial sale brings both opportunity and tax complexity. I help South Florida business owners navigate exactly this transition.
